title: Track Star
description:
Build. Train. Compete. Win.Track Star is a high school track & field career simulation. Start as a lowly freshman, build your athlete week by week, and find out if you've got what it takes to win a national title and earn a college scholarship.

Every week is a decisionEach week you manage your training load, protect your energy, and decide which meets are worth the risk. Push too hard and you're injured. Play it too safe and your rival pulls ahead. There's no perfect playbook, every week presents a choice.

World events shape your seasons too. A heat wave tanks a week of training. A rival school produces a phenom who's suddenly on your radar. The news cycle doesn't stop for your training schedule.

Build the athlete you want Choose your specialty and shape your career around it. A Sprints build plays completely differently from Distance or Jumps. Your stats, training focus, and event selection all compound across four seasons. By senior year, you'll know exactly what kind of athlete you built.

Qualify or go homeThe championship path is real and it's unforgiving. Make your Class meet. Advance to State. Survive Regionals. Only a few athletes reach Nationals — and only one wins. Fall short and you're running the annual Turkey Trot with everyone else who peaked too early.

The rivalry is personalEvery career has a rival. They show up at your meets, they remember your times, and they're not rooting for you. Whether you chase them down or spend four years in their shadow depends entirely on the athlete you built.

It ends with a decision you didn't expectCollege recruitment isn't guaranteed. By senior year, your performance history either opens doors or closes them. Some athletes walk away with scholarship offers. Some walk away with a good story. A few walk away with both.

Features• Four-season high school career 

• Weekly training and competition loop with energy management

• Multiple athlete specializations, each with distinct playstyles

• Championship qualification ladder: Class → State → Regionals → Nationals

• Dynamic rival system that tracks your career arc

• World events engine that shapes your seasons with real context

• College recruitment endgame with scholarship outcomes

• Hard Mode for athletes who think they've seen everything

• Hall of Fame and career records across playthroughs

• Animated Race Results 

• Dozens of achievements and milestones

Disclosure

I use Claude Code to assist in game development, but all content, narrative, formulas, etc. are created by me.
description_short: Four years of high school track & field. One shot at a college scholarship. Choose your specialty, build your athlete, and beat the rival who's been faster than you since day one.
